description_long: This is a rectangular, messenger-style grocery bag with a long, adjustable black shoulder strap attached at both ends. The main body of the bag is made from a reddish-brown, slightly glossy material with visible seams and some printed markings, including numbers and a small logo patch. The front flap covers the main compartment and is secured by the strap, giving the bag a structured yet flexible appearance. The bag appears to be made from a durable, possibly waterproof fabric, such as tarpaulin or recycled material, commonly used for urban carry bags. The sides are relatively narrow, and the bag maintains a flat profile, suggesting it is either empty or only lightly filled. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for carrying groceries or personal items in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular, reddish-brown messenger-style grocery bag with a black shoulder strap and visible printed markings, including a small logo patch. The bag is made from a durable, slightly glossy material and has a flat, structured profile.
description_view_0: The front view shows the reddish-brown flap with vertical seams, black strap attachments, and faint printed numbers on the left side.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the narrow profile of the bag and the black strap running vertically, with minimal visible detail on the side panel.
description_view_2: The back view displays the reddish-brown surface with a small logo patch and additional printed markings, as well as the full width of the flap.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the narrow side panel and the black strap, with no significant markings.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Small rectangular logo patch and faint printed numbers on the exterior
